## Collections.FactoryResultMap.has() method

Determines whether the map has a value for the given key, attempting to construct an item using the factory if it does not already exist.

**Signature:**

```typescript
has(key: TKey): boolean;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

key


</td><td>

TKey


</td><td>

The key to check.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

boolean

`true` if the map has a value for the key, `false` otherwise.

## Remarks

Note that, despite the name, this function can mutate the map.
